stories.title: Krishna guides Arjuna in Teaching confusion
stories.story: During the Kurukshetra war, Arjuna hesitated to fight against his relatives. Krishna reminded him that protecting righteousness requires standing firm even when emotions are painful.
stories.Teaching: Right action is more important than emotional comfort.

stories.title: Krishna chooses to be a charioteer
stories.story: Despite being a divine figure, Krishna chose to be Arjuna’s charioteer instead of picking a weapon. He showed that leadership sometimes means serving quietly.

stories.title: Sudama meets Krishna
stories.story: Sudama visited Krishna with nothing but faith. Krishna welcomed him with overflowing love and generosity, proving that friendship is above wealth.

stories.title: Lifting Govardhan
stories.story: When Indra flooded Vrindavan, Krishna lifted Govardhan Hill on his little finger to protect the villagers.
stories.Teaching: Stand up for the people who depend on you.

stories.title: Universe in Krishna’s mouth
stories.story: Yashoda once asked Krishna to open his mouth. To her shock, she saw the entire universe inside.
stories.Teaching: Divine greatness can hide in simple forms.

stories.title: Teaching Nishkam Karma
stories.story: Krishna taught Arjuna to act without attachment and surrender results to a higher purpose.

stories.title: Saving Draupadi
stories.story: When Draupadi was humiliated, Krishna protected her dignity, proving divine help arrives when intention is pure.

stories.title: Choosing wisdom over army
stories.story: Arjuna chose unarmed Krishna over Krishna’s vast army, showing the power of wisdom over sheer force.
stories.Teaching: Right guidance is stronger than thousands of weapons.

stories.title: Krishna breaks his promise
stories.story: Krishna vowed not to wield weapons, yet charged with a chariot wheel to protect Arjuna.
stories.Teaching: Rules bend when protection of the righteous is at stake.

stories.title: Butter thief with a purpose
stories.story: Krishna’s butter-stealing leelas were playful teachings that joy is divine when shared.
stories.Teaching: Sometimes joy itself is a spiritual lesson.

stories.title: Krishna offers Karna a new destiny
stories.story: Before the Kurukshetra war, Krishna revealed Karna's true identity and offered him the throne if he joined the Pandavas. Karna chose loyalty to Duryodhana despite knowing the consequences.
stories.teaching: Loyalty is noble, but choices still carry consequences.

stories.title: Krishna attempts peace before war
stories.story: Before war began, Krishna made several attempts to negotiate peace between the Kauravas and Pandavas. Only after all peaceful options failed did conflict become unavoidable.
stories.teaching: Seek peace sincerely before resorting to conflict.

stories.title: Krishna rescues Rukmini
stories.story: Rukmini wished to marry Krishna, but her family opposed it. Krishna courageously rescued her and honored her choice.
stories.teaching: Respect individual choice and stand for what is right.

stories.title: The humble gift of beaten rice
stories.story: Sudama offered Krishna a simple gift of beaten rice. Krishna valued the love behind the gift more than its material worth.
stories.teaching: Intent matters more than material value.

stories.title: Krishna subdues Kaliya
stories.story: Krishna defeated the poisonous serpent Kaliya and spared his life after he surrendered.
stories.teaching: Strength should be balanced with compassion.

stories.title: The fruit seller's reward
stories.story: A fruit seller lovingly gave Krishna fruits. In return, her basket was filled with precious jewels.
stories.teaching: Acts of kindness often return in unexpected ways.

stories.title: Teachings to Uddhava
stories.story: Krishna taught Uddhava about self-control, devotion, and detachment from worldly attachments.
stories.teaching: Inner mastery leads to lasting peace.

stories.title: The truth behind the jewel
stories.story: When falsely accused of stealing the Syamantaka jewel, Krishna investigated the matter and revealed the truth.

stories.title: Honoring Bhishma's wisdom
stories.story: After Bhishma fell in battle, Krishna encouraged the Pandavas to seek his wisdom before his departure.
stories.teaching: Learn from wisdom wherever it exists.

stories.title: The devotion of the Gopis
stories.story: The Gopis expressed unwavering devotion toward Krishna, seeing divinity in every aspect of life.
stories.teaching: Deep devotion transforms ordinary life into spiritual practice.

stories.title: Defeating Narakasura
stories.story: Krishna defeated Narakasura to free thousands who were oppressed under his rule.
stories.teaching: Power should be used to protect the vulnerable.

stories.title: The lesson of the Tulsi leaf
stories.story: A single Tulsi leaf offered with devotion outweighed immense riches placed on a scale.

stories.title: Guiding a righteous king
stories.story: Krishna frequently advised Yudhishthira on balancing righteousness with practical leadership.
stories.teaching: Good leadership requires both ideals and wisdom.

stories.title: The arrogant washerman
stories.story: A royal washerman refused Krishna's simple request out of pride and arrogance.
stories.teaching: Pride often blinds people to opportunity.

stories.title: Kindness toward Kubja
stories.story: Krishna showed kindness to Kubja, transforming her life and restoring her confidence.
stories.teaching: Compassion has the power to transform lives.
